results.title: Learn Web Development Basics with HTML CSS and JavaScript
results.body: Jul 23, 2025 · Web development refers to the creating, building, and maintaining of websites. It includes aspects such as web design, web publishing, web programming, and database management. It is the creation of an application that works over the internet i.e. websites. The word Web Development is made up of two words, that is: Web: It refers to websites, web pages, or anything that works over the internet. Development: It refers to building the application from scratch.
